scripts.dev: npm run kill-ports && concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.kill-ports: lsof -ti :8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :5174 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm install --save-dev @types/react @types/react-dom && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
